$comment: Slot config for Alliance Cobrinha Clark social automation. Read by produce-post and daily-check skills. Update theme_signature after Vinz settles on a layout from real drafts (LA pattern).
operating_mode_notes: Every weekly run calls Canva generate-design from scratch with the brand kit + the slot's generation_prompt. No registered master templates. Tradeoff: layout varies week-to-week. Once a slot's layout is locked, switch its mode to 'registered-master' and add design_id.

canva.$comment_brand_kit: kAGdeHDeWjQ is the unnamed brand kit in this Canva account — same kit as the LA build. Whether its actual tokens match Clark's documentation (gold + black + Helvetica) or LA's (black + tan + serif) will be confirmed after the first produce-post run. If misaligned, see brand/README.md for fix options.
canva.$comment_folder: First produce-post run should resolve the destination folder ID and cache it here.

drive.$comment: Skills should match Drive folders by exact name (case + punctuation). If a search returns nothing, surface the missing folder name to the user, don't guess.

theme_signature.$comment: Pulled from Cobrinha Clark Brand Kit (Canva design DAHGJQJqIGc) on 2026-05-08. Documentation specifies the visual identity but the auto-apply Canva brand kit may contain different tokens — first produce-post run will confirm. If drift is observed, either reconfigure the brand kit in Canva, or add explicit color references to each slot's generation_prompt.
theme_signature.background: Black dominant. Slate (#26343b) for secondary surfaces and cards. White as inverted variant.
theme_signature.signature_color: Gold #FED52E — text accent, rule lines, small decorative elements only. Never large fill (loud at scale).
theme_signature.decorative_motifs: Gold underlines on key headlines. Gold rule lines as section dividers. Minimal — let the photo and typography breathe.
theme_signature.headline_treatment: Helvetica Now, white or gold on black. Top-left or top-center. Bold, all-caps optional. Sentence-case for warmth.
theme_signature.subheadline_treatment: Montserrat, white at ~70% opacity. Smaller than headline. Body weight, not bold.
theme_signature.photo_placement: Hero photo dominates 60–70% of canvas. Full-bleed or large rectangular frame. NO shape masks (no rounded corners, no circles). Real over stylized.
theme_signature.typography_hierarchy: Headline (Helvetica Now, bold) > Subhead (Montserrat, regular, 70% opacity) > Tagline / handle (Montserrat, small, white)
theme_signature.logo_placement: @alliancecobrinhaclark text mark bottom-right of every feed post. CLARK wordmark / badge top-left or top-center on hero designs (Saturday social proof, Sunday leader voice especially).

slots.name: Set the Tone
slots.goal: Consistency + presence — start the week strong
slots.generation_prompt: Instagram post, 1080x1350 (4:5 portrait). Brand kit auto-applies. Composition: warm community-first jiu-jitsu academy in Clark, Pampanga. Place hero photo prominently — students arriving for class, coach greeting, mat being prepared, anything that says 'we're here.' Headline area for short text like 'MONDAY. THE MAT IS OPEN.' or 'ANOTHER WEEK. SAME TEAM.' Small bottom-right caption: '@alliancecobrinhaclark'. Keep it understated — Monday is about presence, not hype. No sales language. Tone: settled, welcoming, real.

slots.name: Member Story
slots.goal: Relatability → conversion. Converts better than ads.
slots.generation_prompt: Instagram post, 1080x1350 (4:5 portrait). Brand kit auto-applies. Layout: portrait or candid shot of the featured student takes the visual focus. Quote-card treatment for the member's words — large pull quote in serif, short attribution line below. Examples of pull-quote text: 'Started with zero experience. Still here three months later.' or 'I came for fitness. I stayed for the people.' Small bottom-right caption: '@alliancecobrinhaclark'. Tone: honest, first-person if possible, no marketing polish. Real over produced.

slots.name: Value / Trust
slots.goal: Authority without intimidation. Educational, calm, accessible.
slots.generation_prompt: Instagram reel cover, 1080x1920 (9:16 vertical). Brand kit auto-applies. Video plays SILENT with text overlay only — no voice over allowed. Hero footage: coach demonstrating a fundamental, or coach correcting a student mid-technique. Text overlay (large, top-third): a single educational hook like 'WHY FUNDAMENTALS MATTER' or 'WHAT BEGINNERS SHOULD EXPECT.' Subhead in body text underneath the hook explains in 5–8 words. Bottom: '@alliancecobrinhaclark'. Tone: calm authority, no jargon walls, no hard sell.

slots.name: Kids / Family
slots.goal: Parent conversion (CRITICAL). 50% of roster is kids 6–12; their parents are watching from the sideline.
slots.generation_prompt: Instagram post, 1080x1350 (4:5 portrait). Brand kit auto-applies. CRITICAL slot: the reader is a parent. Hero photo: kids in class, focused, smiling, engaged — NOT mid-throw, NOT sparring intense. Show what a parent wants to see — confidence, listening, a safe room. Headline area: short parent-facing text like 'CONFIDENCE. LISTENING. A SAFE PLACE TO LEARN.' or 'WHAT 45 MINUTES ON THE MAT BUILDS.' Small bottom-right caption: '@alliancecobrinhaclark'. Tone: reassuring, lead with what kids gain, never sound like adult class recruiting.

slots.name: Community
slots.goal: Belonging. End-of-week vibe, looser than Monday.
slots.generation_prompt: Instagram post, 1080x1350 (4:5 portrait). Brand kit auto-applies. Hero photo: post-class moments — students laughing, group standing around the mat, water bottles and gis, the unposed warmth between training. NOT action shots, NOT technique. Headline area: short warm copy like 'WE TRAIN HARD. WE ENJOY THE PROCESS.' or 'THE WORK BETWEEN THE HIGHLIGHTS.' Small bottom-right caption: '@alliancecobrinhaclark'. Tone: settled, warm, end-of-week.

slots.name: Social Proof
slots.goal: FOMO. Show the room is full. Quietly confident.
slots.generation_prompt: Instagram post, 1080x1350 (4:5 portrait). Brand kit auto-applies. Hero photo: full-room shot — group photo after class, packed open mat, big team lineup. The image must communicate scale (lots of people, full mat). Headline area: short copy like 'WEEKEND TRAINING WITH THE TEAM.' or 'BUILT TOGETHER.' or '42 OF US. AND COUNTING.' Small bottom-right caption: '@alliancecobrinhaclark'. Tone: quietly confident — let the image do the talking. NEVER 'limited slots' or 'don't miss out.'

slots.name: Leader Voice
slots.goal: Trust + leadership. Close the week with intention.
slots.generation_prompt: Instagram reel cover, 1080x1920 (9:16 vertical). Brand kit auto-applies. SILENT video with text overlay only — no voice over. Hero footage: 15–30 second clip of the academy at training, professor walking the mat, or a wide shot of the room mid-class. Text overlay (large, top-third): a leadership-voice hook like 'WHAT WE'RE BUILDING.' or 'BUILT TOGETHER — ONE MAT, ONE TEAM.' Subhead body text underneath in 5–10 words. Bottom: '@alliancecobrinhaclark'. Tone: reflective, forward-looking — the voice of the academy.
